title: Feather Fix

this mods is get you fps and fix your mods problems

and best news is this modpack is avaible on sklauncher
body:
![Minecraft Best Hosting With My Promo Code](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e5390816f102e0c939f7cc9e8e7c41a1621934c_0.webp)!


Tired of Feather Client crashing or getting stuck?
This lightweight modpack is specially designed to fix common issues with the Feather Launcher. Whether it's crashing on startup, loading screen freeze, or mod conflicts — this pack helps your client run smooth and stable.

🔧 Optimized for Minecraft 1.20.1
🧩 Built using Fabric Loader
✅ Perfect for low-end PCs too!




---

💡 Features:

Fixes common Feather Launcher crashes

Boosts stability and reduces freezing

Compatible with most Feather-supported mods

Lightweight and simple — just drag, install, and play!



---

🛠 Requirements:

Minecraft 1.20.1

Fabric Loader 0.14.22

Feather Launcher (latest)



---

📁 How to Install:

1. Download the .mrpack file


2. Import it into Feather Launcher


3. Click Play and enjoy smooth Minecraft
